KeysToEntries.BoneArrows: Arrows with tips carved from animal fangs.
KeysToEntries.BronzeArrow: Arrows with tips forged from bronze.
KeysToEntries.IronArrows: Arrows with tips forged from iron.
KeysToEntries.StoneArrows: Arrows with tips of splintered stone.
KeysToEntries.AdventurersTunic: Basic and comfortable attire fit for a new Adventurer.
KeysToEntries.ApprenticeRobe: Provides basic protection for trainees in the magical arts.
KeysToEntries.ReinforcedBody: A heavy chestplate made from Leather and Bone.
KeysToEntries.BronzePlatebody: A heavy chestplate made from bronze.
KeysToEntries.HardLeatherBody: Durable armour crafted from hard leather.
KeysToEntries.DarkMageRobes: Magical armour for the edgier wizard.
KeysToEntries.DragonkinMageRobes: Robes styled after the ancient overlords of Ashenfall.
KeysToEntries.IronPlatebody: A heavy iron chestplate, providing superior protection in battle.
KeysToEntries.PaladinPlatebody: A heavy chestplate worn by the Paladin's of Saradomin.
KeysToEntries.StuddedLeatherArmour: Durable armour crafted from hard leather reinforced with iron studs.
KeysToEntries.WildArcherBody: Durable armour worn by a Wild Knight archer.
KeysToEntries.AlphaCape: A badge of honor for those who completed all challenges during the closed Alpha Test.
KeysToEntries.BloodblightCape: A cloak commemorating a dragon's vengeance.
KeysToEntries.BramblemeadCape: A cloak to remember the simpler times.
KeysToEntries.EarlyAccessCape: A cape worn by Ashenfall's first explorers.
KeysToEntries.FracturedCape: A cloak warning against the danger of hubris.
KeysToEntries.GarouCape: A cloak worn by garou nobility.
KeysToEntries.GoblinCape: A cloak reminding us that even gods can be forgotten.
KeysToEntries.BagOfNoggin: The only thing this protects is your identity.
KeysToEntries.EarlyAdopterHead: A scarf worn by Ashenfall's first explorers.
KeysToEntries.ApprenticeHat: A comfortable hat made from linen, perfect for adventurers who are practicing magic.
KeysToEntries.ReinforcedHelmet: Protect your noggin with this basic headgear made from Leather and Bone.
KeysToEntries.HardLeatherCowl: A durable helmet crafted from hard leather.
KeysToEntries.WizardHat: A stylish hat, popular with spellcasters.
KeysToEntries.DarkMageHood: A mystical hood, popular with edgier wizards.
KeysToEntries.DragonkinMageHood: A hood styled after the ancient overlords of Ashenfall.
KeysToEntries.IronHelmet: Protect your head with this sturdy iron headgear.
KeysToEntries.PaladinHelmet: A metal helm, worn by paladins in service to the church of Saradomin.
KeysToEntries.StuddedLeatherCowl: A durable helmet crafted from hard leather reinforced with iron studs.
KeysToEntries.WildArcherCowl: A helmet worn by a Wild Knight archer.
KeysToEntries.GarouBow: With it's aerodynamic antlers, this bow is very popular with Garou scouts.
KeysToEntries.HunterLongbow: A finely crafted longbow, powerful and precise.
KeysToEntries.OakLongbow: A powerful longbow carved from oak wood.
KeysToEntries.HunterShortbow: A finely crafted bow, fast and reliable.
KeysToEntries.OakShortbow: An agile shortbow carved from oak wood.
KeysToEntries.WildScoutBow: A bow used by Wild Knight scout. Maintaining balance, one arrow at a time.
KeysToEntries.WoodShortbow: A shortbow carved from ash wood.
KeysToEntries.BoneDagger: A sinister weapon, crafted from the bones of fallen creatures.
KeysToEntries.BronzeDagger: A small blade forged from bronze, suitable for close combat.
KeysToEntries.DragonboneDagger: A ferocious blade, filled with primal draconic rage.
KeysToEntries.IronDagger: A sharp, compact weapon, perfect for quick strikes in close combat.
KeysToEntries.StoneDagger: A rudimentary blade, handy in close combat.
KeysToEntries.IronGreataxe: A massive, two-handed axe, capable of delivering devastating blows.
KeysToEntries.ThaneGreataxe: A hefting greataxe, wielded by the powerful garou thanes.
KeysToEntries.BronzeGreatsword: A two-handed bronze sword for those who prefer power over speed.
KeysToEntries.IronGreatsword: A well-balanced, large, imposing sword for skilled warriors.
KeysToEntries.BronzeWarhammer: A heavy-hitting, two-handed weapon crafted from bronze.
KeysToEntries.IronWarhammer: A brutal two-handed weapon, capable of smashing through enemy defences.
KeysToEntries.BronzeLoggingAxe: A woodcutter's tool, forged from bronze.
KeysToEntries.IronLoggingAxe: A durable tool for chopping trees, ideal for budding lumberjacks.
KeysToEntries.StoneLoggingAxe: A crude but functional axe for chopping trees.
KeysToEntries.BoneClub: A primitive weapon made from bone, perfect for smashing other bones.
KeysToEntries.StoneClub: A primitive weapon made from stone, perfect for early adventurers.
KeysToEntries.GoblinSwingslash: A surprisingly nasty little axe. Popular with goblin warriors.
KeysToEntries.WoodenClub: A basic melee weapon. Handy in a pinch.
KeysToEntries.BronzeMace: Crush your foes with this heavy, spiked bronze mace.
KeysToEntries.IronMace: Crush your foes with this heavy, spiked iron mace.
KeysToEntries.SkullSplitter: A deadly weapon, with a distubingly accurate name.
KeysToEntries.FriedCabbage: Yum! Maybe I do like cabbage.
KeysToEntries.Steak: A delicious steak. The perfect campfire meal.
KeysToEntries.BerryCompote: A fruity medly of cooked berries. A great sweet treat to enjoy in the wild.
KeysToEntries.DriedDwellberries: Sweet and chewy, a great fruity snack.
KeysToEntries.DriedRedberries: A little sour, but a tasty snack.
KeysToEntries.DwellberryGlazedRoastFlank: A delicious flank steak, covered in a fruity dwellbery glaze. Mouthwateringly tasty!
KeysToEntries.DwellberryGlazedRoastMeat: A juicy piece of roasted meat, with a deliciously fruity dwellberry glazing. Scrumptious!
KeysToEntries.RedberryGlazedRoastFlank: A delicious flank steak, covered in a fruity redberry glaze. Delightfully delicious!
KeysToEntries.RedberryGlazedRoastMeat: A juicy piece of roasted meat, with a tangy redberry glazing. Tasty!
KeysToEntries.WildPie: A triumph of man over nature.
KeysToEntries.MeatPizza: A pizza with bits of meat on it.
KeysToEntries.Fillet: Roasted bird meat. Tastes like everything.
KeysToEntries.Haunch: Roasted game meat. Tender and tasty.
KeysToEntries.MixedGrill: Why just eat one animal? A carnivore's favourite.
KeysToEntries.MixedPlatter: Why just eat one animal? A carnivore's delight!
KeysToEntries.RatRoast: A survivalist meal. Just pretend it's something else.
KeysToEntries.FriedOnion: A pungeant meal that brings a tear to your eye.
KeysToEntries.BakedPotato: Fluffy and delicious, if only you had some butter.
KeysToEntries.FortifyingSoup: A warm vegetable soup, with added mushrooms.
KeysToEntries.HeartySoup: A comforting vegetable soup, reminds you of rainy days sat by the fire.
KeysToEntries.HeartyFortifyingSoup: A comforting vegetable soup with added mushrooms. Helps prepare you for a grueling day ahead.
KeysToEntries.VegetableSoup: A tasty soup, good for the soul.
KeysToEntries.FortifyingStew: A warm meat and mushroom stew, fortifies you against the trials ahead.
KeysToEntries.HeartyStew: A nice hot stew. A taste of home.
KeysToEntries.MeatStew: Meat and vegetables, the classic combination. A warm and pleasant meal.
KeysToEntries.DwellberryInfusion: A refreshing fruity drink. Very good for hydration.
KeysToEntries.RedberryInfusion: A refreshing fruity drink. Good for hydration.
KeysToEntries.FerociousInfusion: A hydrating drink, infused with primal fury.
KeysToEntries.EvasiveInfusion: A thirst-quenching drink, that improves your reflexes.
KeysToEntries.FleetFootedInfusion: A thirst-quenching drink, that puts a spring in your step.
KeysToEntries.CleanWater: A source of hydration, free from the taint of natural water sources.
KeysToEntries.DirtyWater: A source of hydration, tainted by the residue of a cataclysmic event.
KeysToEntries.StaffOfLight: A mystical weapon humming with power, wielded by powerful Saradominist Wizards ages past.
KeysToEntries.DragonkinMageLegs: Leggings styled after the ancient overlords of Ashenfall.
KeysToEntries.WildArcherLegs: Durable leg armour worn by a Wild Knight archer.
KeysToEntries.ClayDecoration_Unfired: A figurine made from clay. Still wet.
KeysToEntries.ClayDecoration_Fired: A figurine made from clay. Now, much more solid.
KeysToEntries.SkillTome.Basic.Attack: A book filled with knowledge on the use of melee weapons. Awards a small amount of Attack XP.
KeysToEntries.SkillTome.Basic.Artisan: A book filled with knowledge about how to craft tools and equipment. Awards a small amount of Artisan XP.
KeysToEntries.SkillTome.Basic.Construction: A book filled with knowledge about how to be a better architect. Awards a small amount of Construction XP.
KeysToEntries.SkillTome.Basic.Cooking: A book filled with knowledge on how to cook better meals. Awards a small amount of Cooking XP.
KeysToEntries.SkillTome.Basic.Magic: A book filled with knowledge about how to wield deadlier spells. Awards a small amount of Magic XP.
KeysToEntries.SkillTome.Basic.Mining: A book filled with knowledge on how to swing a pickaxe. Awards a small amount of Mining XP.
KeysToEntries.SkillTome.Basic.Ranged: A book filled with knowledge about the intricacies of archery. Awards a small amount of Ranged XP.
KeysToEntries.SkillTome.Basic.Runecrafting: A book filled with knowledge about how to bind anima within rune essence. Awards a small amount of Runecrafting XP.
KeysToEntries.SkillTome.Basic.Woodcutting: A book filled with knowledge about how best to chop down trees. Awards a small amount of Woodcutting XP.
KeysToEntries.Skilltome.Dragonslayer: A powerful tome containing ancient techniques of warfare. Grants a large amount of experience in the Attack, Magic and Ranged skills.
KeysToEntries.Whetstone: Use this to hone your equipped melee weapon.
KeysToEntries.MagicFocus: Imbue your staff to increase the damage of your magical attacks for a limited time.
KeysToEntries.MagicPotion: Consume this potion to increase your critical chance with magical attacks.
KeysToEntries.WeaponPoison:
A vial of Weapon Poison. 

Used in crafting Poison Arrows or to coat your equipped Melee Weapon with Poison for a short time.
KeysToEntries.WeaponBarbs:
Pointy! 

Used to craft Barbed Arrows or to coat your equipped melee weapon with barbs, causing Bleed buildup for a short duration.
KeysToEntries.EnchantedBronzeCrossbowBolts: Bronze crossbow bolts tipped with enchanted opal, that have a chance to summon a lightning strike around your target, dealing Air magic damage to all nearby enemies.
KeysToEntries.EnchantedIronCrossbowBolts: Iron crossbow bolts tipped with enchanted Jade, that have a chance of dealing Water magic damage and slowing your target.
KeysToEntries.EnchantedBluriteCrossbowBolts: Blurite crossbow bolts tipped with enchanted Jade, that have a chance of dealing Earth magic damage and knocking your target down.
KeysToEntries.FireOil: Throw this at your enemies to set them on fire!
KeysToEntries.BluriteCrossbow: A crossbow made from Blurite, thought to be a myth.
KeysToEntries.BronzeLimbs: A pair of bronze crossbow limbs. Used in crafting a Bronze Crossbow.
KeysToEntries.IronLimbs: A pair of iron crossbow limbs. Used in crafting an Iron Crossbow.
KeysToEntries.BluriteLimbs: A pair of blurite crossbow limbs. Used in crafting a Blurite Crossbow.
KeysToEntries.BluriteBar: A rare bar of refined Blurite, thought to be myth.
KeysToEntries.BluriteOre: A chunk of rare and unrefined Blurite.
KeysToEntries.PoisonBoneArrows: Arrows with tips carved from animal fangs coated in Weapon Poison.
KeysToEntries.PoisonBronzeArrows: Arrows with tips forged from bronze coated in Weapon Poison.
KeysToEntries.PoisonIronArrows: Arrows with tips forged from iron coated in Weapon Poison.
KeysToEntries.BarbedBronzeArrows: Lacerating arrows with barbed tips forged from bronze.
KeysToEntries.BarbedIronArrows: Lacerating arrows with barbed tips forged from iron.
KeysToEntries.FireBronzeArrows: Burning arrows with tips forged from bronze coated in fire oil.
KeysToEntries.FireIronArrows: Burning arrows with tips forged from iron coated in fire oil.
KeysToEntries.FireOilNonThrowable:
Flammable and volatile, handle with care!

Used to craft Fire arrows.
KeysToEntries.Shrapnel: A collection of various sharp objects.
KeysToEntries.Airrune:
Equippable as ammo when using a Magic Weapon.

A symbol of blustering winds, essential for air-based magic and other spells. 

Runes are retained if you happen to die.
KeysToEntries.AstralRune:
Astral runes are used for casting advanced magic spells and attacks. 

Runes are retained if you happen to die.
KeysToEntries.EarthRune:
A symbol of the earth's might, essential for earth-based magic. 

Runes are retained if you happen to die.
KeysToEntries.FireRune:
Equippable as ammo when using a Magic Weapon (provided the required Skill Perk is unlocked).

A symbol of blazing heat, essential for fire-based magic. 

Runes are retained if you happen to die.
KeysToEntries.LawRune:
Resource needed for teleportation.

Runes are retained if you happen to die.
KeysToEntries.NatureRune:
Nature runes are used for casting transmutation spells. 

Runes are retained if you happen to die.
KeysToEntries.WaterRune:
A symbol of flowing waters, essential for water-based magic and other spells. 

Runes are retained if you happen to die.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.DragonkinRobe: An ancient robe, tattered beyond repair, but perhaps you could learn something from it.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.PaladinArmour: The remnants of armour worn long ago by Saradominst knights. Perhaps you can learn something from it.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.WildArcher: Scraps of leather, embroidered with curious patterns. Perhaps you can learn something from it.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.DragonkinRobeHood: A hood, worn to the barest of threads by the passage of time. Perhaps you could learn something from it.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.PaladinHelm: Barely more than metal scraps and time-worn leather. Still, perhaps you could learn something from it.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.BagofNoggin: An odd bundle of scratchy sackcloth. It's unsettling to hold. Still, perhaps you could learn something from it.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.WildArcherHelm: A leathery coif, long worn away into barely more than memories. Still, perhaps you could learn something from it.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.DragonkinRobeLegs: Tattered remnants of ancient robes. Perhaps you could learn something from them.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.Bootsoflightness: Barely heavier than a feather, but worn away by time's cruel march. Still, perhaps you could learn something from it.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.PaladinLegs: Nothing but scrap metal now. Still, perhaps you could learn something from them.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.WildArcherLegs: Leathery scraps, victims of entropy's touch. Still, perhaps you could learn something from them.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.ShatteredSkull: A skull, obliterated by a particularly nasty weapon. If you study it, perhaps you might learn something.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.Swingslash: A rusted blade with a wicked edge. Barely usable now, but perhaps you could learn something from it.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.BluriteCrossbow: A contraption made from strange blue metal. Perhaps you could learn something from it.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.DragonDagger: Remants of a dragon's tooth, perhaps? Looks like it was carved. Perhaps you could learn something from it.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.ThaneGreataxe: A powerful looking blade, broken beyond repair. Still, perhaps you could learn something from it.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.AdventurersLongbow: The remains of a longbow, damaged in a dragon attack. Perhaps you could learn something from it.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.HunterStagBow: Sinew, bound tightly enough to be dangerous. Useless now, but perhaps you could learn something from it.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.ShortbowWildScouts: The last few splinters of an ancient shortbow. Perhaps you could learn something from it.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.DragonkinStaff: Although damaged beyond repair, this staff seethes with ancient power. Perhaps you could learn something from it.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.GrievingmoonStaff: What's left of a staff that feels soaked in sorrow. Perhaps you could learn something from it.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.ChieftainsBlade: The rusted remains of a symbol of authority. Perhaps you could learn something from it.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.TrainingBlade: A crude wooden blade and handle; what's left of a child's toy turned to weaponry. Perhaps you could learn something from it.
KeysToEntries.SteelDagger: A fine dagger made from high quality Steel.
KeysToEntries.SteelSword: For fighting monsters and swearing Oaths.
KeysToEntries.SteelScimitar: A vicious, curved sword of Eastern Origins forged from Steel.
KeysToEntries.SteelMace: A brutal crush weapon forged from high quality Steel.
KeysToEntries.SteelGreatsword: A two handed Steel Sword made famous by Highland Warriors.
KeysToEntries.SteelGreataxe: A two handed Battleaxe forged from Steel.
KeysToEntries.SteelWarhammer: A massive weapon made from Steel. Great for hammering really big nails.
KeysToEntries.WillowLongbow: A precise Longbow crafted from Willow.
KeysToEntries.WillowShortbow: An agile Shortbow crafted from Willow.
KeysToEntries.SteelArrows: Arrows with tips forged from Steel.
KeysToEntries.PoisonedSteelArrows: Arrows with tips forged from Steel coated in Weapon Poison.
KeysToEntries.SteelBarbedArrows: Lacerating arrows with barbed tips forged from Steel.
KeysToEntries.SteelFireArrows: Burning arrows with tips forged from Steel coated in fire oil.
KeysToEntries.EnchantedSteelBolts: Steel crossbow bolts tipped with enchanted Red Topaz. Has a chance to create a necrotic bolt that heals your lifeward for a proportion of the damage dealt.
KeysToEntries.SplitbarkStaff: A Mage's Weapon crafted from Wither rotted Hollow Bark. It has Strange Magical Properties.
KeysToEntries.WolfbaneDagger: A silver dagger that brings fear to all those who howl in the night.
KeysToEntries.ShadowSword: This Greatsword exsists between the realms of the living and the dead.
KeysToEntries.DorgeshuunCrossbow: The signature weapon of the Dorgeshuun Goblin tribe. It fires Bone bolts and is surprisingly well made!
KeysToEntries.BoneBolts: Lightweight, but very sharp. Can be fired using the Dorgeshuun Crossbow.
KeysToEntries.UndeadRangersBow: This bow still fires with undeadly precision.
KeysToEntries.NecromancersStaff: Necromantic essence still eminates from this staff.
KeysToEntries.ImarusTalon: A Scimitar forged from the Visage of Imaru.
KeysToEntries.SteelFullHelm: A full helm forged from Steel for Melee users.
KeysToEntries.SteelPlatebody: A strong set of well crafted Steel Platemail for Melee users.
KeysToEntries.SteelPlatelegs: Sturdy and well-made Steel leg armour for Melee users.
KeysToEntries.GreenDragonhideCoif: Lightweight Ranger headgear crafted from Green Dragonhide for Ranged users
KeysToEntries.GreenDragonhideBody: Ranged body armour crafted from Green Dragonhide. Form fitting yet intimidating.
KeysToEntries.GreenDragonhideChaps: Agile Ranged leg armour crafted from Green Dragonhide.
KeysToEntries.SplitbarkHelm: Magical head armour crafted from wither corrupted Hollow Bark.
KeysToEntries.SplitbarkBody: Magical armour crafted from Fine Cloth and Hollow Bark. It has strange magical properties.
KeysToEntries.SplitbarkLegs: Magical leg armour armour crafted from wither corrupted Hollow Bark.
KeysToEntries.WhiteFullHelm: A helmet worn by a member of the Holy Order of White Knights. It is pure white
KeysToEntries.WhitePlatebody: White platemail armour worn by a member of the Holy Order of White Knights.
KeysToEntries.WhitePlatelegs: White Platelegs worn by a member of the Holy Order of White Knights.
KeysToEntries.RangerHat: Ranger head gear. Wearing this gives you the urge to rob from the rich to help the poor for some reason.
KeysToEntries.RangerTunic: Ranger armour that's as dangerous as it is dapper!
KeysToEntries.RangerTights: Ranger leg gear that makes you feel both agile and slightly rebellious.
KeysToEntries.NecromancersCrown: Magical headgear for those that rule over their undead minions.
KeysToEntries.NecromancersRobeTop: Magical robes for those who believe that death is only the beginning.
KeysToEntries.NecromancersRobeBottom: Magical robe bottoms for Sorcerer's that have no concept of ethics.
KeysToEntries.FallenHoplitesAspis: The shield of an Undead Hoplite.
KeysToEntries.SalveAmulet: A powerful amulet made from a crystal that has absorbed the magical blessings of the River Salve.
KeysToEntries.ImaruShield: The Spirit of Imaru lives on within this shield.
KeysToEntries.FallenHoplitesHelm: A Melee helmet once belonging to a long dead Saradomin Hoplite.
KeysToEntries.FallenHoplitesChest: Melee chest armour once belonging to a long dead Saradomin Hoplite.
KeysToEntries.FallenHoplitesTassets: Melee leg armour once belonging to a long dead Saradomin Hoplite.
KeysToEntries.FellhollowCape: A cloak depicting the ethereal beauty of Fellhollow.
KeysToEntries.ShadowscaleCape: A cape worn by those from the lands of death and decay.
KeysToEntries.ShadowscaleHood: Ranger Headgear worn by the Skeleton Archer's from Fellhollow.
KeysToEntries.SteelLimbs: A pair of Steel crossbow limbs. Used in crafting a Steel Crossbow.
KeysToEntries.DorgeshuunLimbs: Crossbow limbs made from powerful bone. Used in crafting the Dorgeshuun Crossbow.
KeysToEntries.SteelLoggingAxe: A woodcutter's tool, forged from Steel.
KeysToEntries.SteelPickaxe: A Miner's tool, forged from Steel.
KeysToEntries.SteelShield: A reliable, durable shield crafted from Steel, perfect for tanking big hits.
KeysToEntries.SkillTome.Intermediate.Artisan: A book filled with knowledge about how to craft tools and equipment. Awards a decent amount of Artisan XP.
KeysToEntries.SkillTome.Intermediate.Attack: A book filled with knowledge on the use of melee weapons. Awards a decent amount of Attack XP.
KeysToEntries.SkillTome.Intermediate.Construction: A book filled with knowledge about how to be a better architect. Awards a decent amount of Construction XP.
KeysToEntries.SkillTome.Intermediate.Cooking: A book filled with knowledge on how to cook better meals. Awards a decent amount of Cooking XP.
KeysToEntries.SkillTome.Intermediate.Magic: A book filled with knowledge about how to wield deadlier spells. Awards a decent amount of Magic XP.
KeysToEntries.SkillTome.Intermediate.Mining: A book filled with knowledge on how to swing a pickaxe. Awards a decent amount of Mining XP.
KeysToEntries.SkillTome.Intermediate.Ranged: A book filled with knowledge about the intricacies of archery. Awards a decent amount of Ranged XP.
KeysToEntries.SkillTome.Intermediate.Runecrafting: A book filled with knowledge about how to bind anima within rune essence. Awards a decent amount of Runecrafting XP.
KeysToEntries.SkillTome.Intermediate.Woodcutting: A book filled with knowledge about how best to chop down trees. Awards a decent amount of Woodcutting XP.
KeysToEntries.SkillTome.Basic.Farming: A book filled with knowledge about how to apply dirt and water to seeds. Awards a small amount of Farming XP.
KeysToEntries.SkillTome.Intermediate.Farming: A book filled with knowledge about how to apply dirt and water to seeds. Awards a decent amount of Farming XP.
KeysToEntries.GarouPack: A brutal bag sewn from hide and sinew.
KeysToEntries.GoblinPack: A cloth shoulder bag, grimy and poorly kept.
KeysToEntries.SkeletonPack: A dusty sack that rattles when you shake it.
KeysToEntries.ZombiePack: A moist and squishly bag of bits.
KeysToEntries.ZogrePack: A foul smelling sack hewn from human skin.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.HeadWhite: A battered helmet. Perhaps you could learn something from it.
KeysToEntries.UndeadBone: Dropped from the restless dead. Use as a crafting material, or process at a grindstone.
KeysToEntries.Coal: Typically found in rocky areas and caves. Combine with metal ores at an upgraded smelter to create higher tiered metal bars.
KeysToEntries.GreenDragonhide: Obtained from felled Lesser Green Dragons. Can be processed at the tannery.
KeysToEntries.DraconicHide: Dropped from felled draconic beasts. Can be processed at the tannery.
KeysToEntries.CorpseCotton: Drops from a volitle bulbous plant that explodes when hit. Can be spun at the  spinning wheel to create fine thread.
KeysToEntries.Ectoplasm: Dropped from aggressive spirits or extracted from wither hearts. Used in crafting.
KeysToEntries.UndeadMeat: Obtained from undead beasts. Can be cooked for... interesting results.
KeysToEntries.WitheredHeart: Dropped from withered enemies. Used as a crafting ingredient.
KeysToEntries.Pumpkin: More treat than trick. Can be cooked by itself or used as an ingredient in cooking meals.
KeysToEntries.Cadavaberries: Can be eaten raw, but wouldn't recommend it. Can be cooked alone or as an ingredient in cooking meals.
KeysToEntries.Irit: Havested from Thorny Irit Roots, used in potion making at the brewing cauldron.
KeysToEntries.HollowBark: Found lying around Fellhollow, around long-dead trees. Used in the crafting.
KeysToEntries.WillowLogs: A highly efficient fuel. Required for smelting more advanced metals.
KeysToEntries.HardLeatherScraps: Dropped from beasts in Fellhollow. Combined at the tannery to create hard leather.
KeysToEntries.DragonBlood: Harvested from dragons and dragonwolves. Used as a tanning agent at the tannery.
KeysToEntries.SteelBar: Made by smelting coal and iron ore together. A primary ingredient for steel weapons, armour and tools.
KeysToEntries.GreenDragonhideLeather: Made by tanning green dragonhide. A key crafting component for armour.
KeysToEntries.FineThread: Made from spun corpse cotton. Can be used as a bow string, and in stitching weapons and gear.
KeysToEntries.FineCloth: Woven from fine thread and gold. Used in weapon and armour crafting.
KeysToEntries.NecroticBonemeal: Made from ground up undead bone. A useful crafting ingredient.
KeysToEntries.SacredOil: Made from combining necrotic bonemeal and ectoplasm. Used as a crafting component.
KeysToEntries.DraconicLeather: A sturdy leather made from draconic hide, or from tanning hard leather with dragon blood.
KeysToEntries.PrimordialHeart: The heart of a nature spirit, you hunted this for Vannaka. He wants three of them.
KeysToEntries.Trinket.RingOfRecoil.Description: A PERCENTAGE of DAMAGE received is DEALT back to ATTACKERS
KeysToEntries.Trinket.RingOfPursuit.Description: ANIMALS are less AWARE of your PRESENCE
KeysToEntries.Trinket.RingOfLife.Description: When close to DEATH, TELEPORTS you to your current BED
KeysToEntries.DriedCadavaberries: Probably not poisonous. A neat little snack.
KeysToEntries.StoneBlock: A building material. Used for advanced construction.
KeysToEntries.Cursefragment.Emberwood: A crystallised part of a curse, imbued with Imaru's grief.
KeysToEntries.Cursefragment.Silverthorn: A crystallised part of a curse, imbued with Imaru's despair.
KeysToEntries.Cursefragment.Vault: A crystallised part of a curse, imbued with Imaru's rage.
KeysToEntries.SoulFragment: Someone may have use for this.
KeysToEntries.RelentlesssInfusion: A tasty tipple that'll put a quiver in your quiver.
KeysToEntries.WitherWater: A source of hydration, tainted by the realm of Imaru.
KeysToEntries.Skilltome.Deathquest: A powerful tome containing the forgotten knowledge of the fallen. Grants a large amount of experience in the Attack, Magic and Ranged skills.
KeysToEntries.DraconicVisage: The image of a fearsome dragon. Used in crafting powerful equipment.
KeysToEntries.VegballSweet: A marvelous amalgamation of sweet and savoury.
KeysToEntries.TomatoGrilled: Fire really brings out the flavour.
KeysToEntries.PumpkinSpiceInfusion: A seasonal treat, popular with some.
KeysToEntries.GenericBurnt: Too well done, but still edible.
KeysToEntries.CadavaberryInfusion: A refreshing fruity drink. Excellent for hydration.
KeysToEntries.SteakAndEggs: A marvelous way, to start your day.
KeysToEntries.UndeadSteak: A technically edible steak. Morally? That's another question
KeysToEntries.bread: Crusty brown outside, pillowy white inside.
KeysToEntries.Potion.WeakHealing: A potion that restores a small amount of health.
KeysToEntries.Potion.LesserHealing: A potion that restores a moderate amount of health.
KeysToEntries.FuelPellet: A high temperature fuel. Needed to smelt more advanced metals.
KeysToEntries.EggFried: Eggs, sunny side up, a nutritious snack.
KeysToEntries.PungentOmelette: Tastes much better than it's name suggests.
KeysToEntries.VeganFryup: All of the calories, none of the guilt.
KeysToEntries.FruitPie: A fruit party, wrapped in golden pastry.
KeysToEntries.Flour: Cultivated grains ground to a fine powder.
KeysToEntries.ImarusHead: Proof of your triumph over the Soul-Eater. It's dripping ectoplasm all over, you should probably get rid of it...
KeysToEntries.AnimalHorn: A cartilaginous extension of an animal skull.
KeysToEntries.WintumberTree: A decorative tree with which to celebrate the festive season.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.DeathsShopeGeneric.Armour: The ancient remnants of some sort of armour. Perhaps you could learn something from it.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.DeathsShopeGeneric.Weapon: Broken pieces of an old weapon. Perhaps you can learn something from them.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.DeathsShopeGeneric.Other: The tattered pieces of a mysterious object. Perhaps you could learn something from them.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.ScimitarImaru: A vicious claw once belonging to Imaru, which was used to try and rip you apart more than a few times. Perhaps you could learn something from it.
KeysToEntries.ZombieAxe: Made in the style of an ancient axe often found in the hands of zombies, it is capable of dealing both Crush and Slash damage at the same time. There seems to be more to this axe though...
KeysToEntries.Vestige.ZombieAxe: A very old and rusted axe, well beyond repair. Still, perhaps you could learn something from it.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.UndeadShovel: The sinister remains of farming equipment. Perhaps you can learn something from it.
KeysToEntries.AttackSkillcape: Congratulations! Reaching level 99 in Attack is an astonishing feat. Wear this cape with pride.
KeysToEntries.MagicSkillcape: Congratulations! Reaching level 99 in Magic is an astonishing feat. Wear this cape with pride.
KeysToEntries.RangedSkillcape: Congratulations! Reaching level 99 in Ranged is an astonishing feat. Wear this cape with pride.
KeysToEntries.MiningSkillcape: Congratulations! Reaching level 99 in Mining is an astonishing feat. Wear this cape with pride.
KeysToEntries.WoodcuttingSkillcape: Congratulations! Reaching level 99 in Woodcutting is an astonishing feat. Wear this cape with pride.
KeysToEntries.ArtisanSkillcape: Congratulations! Reaching level 99 in Artisan is an astonishing feat. Wear this cape with pride.
KeysToEntries.ConstructionSkillcape: Congratulations! Reaching level 99 in Construction is an astonishing feat. Wear this cape with pride.
KeysToEntries.CookingSkillcape: Congratulations! Reaching level 99 in Cooking is an astonishing feat. Wear this cape with pride.
KeysToEntries.RunecraftingSkillcape: Congratulations! Reaching level 99 in Runecrafting is an astonishing feat. Wear this cape with pride.
KeysToEntries.FarmingSkillcape: Congratulations! Reaching level 99 in Farming is an astonishing feat. Wear this cape with pride.
KeysToEntries.FishingSkillcape: Congratulations! Reaching level 99 in Fishing is an astonishing feat. Wear this cape with pride.
KeysToEntries.AvasAccumulator:
A bagged chicken ready to serve you, magnet in claw. 

Increases Arrow Recovery Chance and automatically picks up recovered arrows.
KeysToEntries.AdventureCape10DowdunReach: A cape made for its looks more than any kind of magical potency.
KeysToEntries.AdventureCape1DowdunReach: A cape made for its looks more than any kind of magical potency.
KeysToEntries.AdventureCape2DowdunReach: A cape made for its looks more than any kind of magical potency.
KeysToEntries.AdventureCape3DowdunReach: A cape made for its looks more than any kind of magical potency.
KeysToEntries.AdventureCape4DowdunReach: A cape made for its looks more than any kind of magical potency.
KeysToEntries.AdventureCape5DowdunReach: A cape made for its looks more than any kind of magical potency.
KeysToEntries.AdventureCape6DowdunReach: A cape made for its looks more than any kind of magical potency.
KeysToEntries.AdventureCape7DowdunReach: A cape made for its looks more than any kind of magical potency.
KeysToEntries.AdventureCape8DowdunReach: A cape made for its looks more than any kind of magical potency.
KeysToEntries.AdventureCape9DowdunReach: A cape made for its looks more than any kind of magical potency.
KeysToEntries.Alric: The archmage and lead demon summoner of Dowdun Reach.
KeysToEntries.Anchovies: A difficult but worthwhile catch. Salty when seared.
KeysToEntries.AnchovyBait: Cute little cannibal fish love some anchovy bait.
KeysToEntries.AnglersHat: A rather dapper looking cap that also reduces the chance of gaining junk while fishing.
KeysToEntries.AnimatedFeather: To a fish, this feather looks like a long-lost love.
KeysToEntries.AntifirePotion: Removes Burning stacks and grants future protection to Burning.
KeysToEntries.ArmouredCatfish: The armadillo of the fish world. Catch it and braise it.
KeysToEntries.AshRod: Crafted from an ash log and some coarse thread. A sturdy fishing rod.
KeysToEntries.BerryDrizzlePanSeared: Made by combining smoked herring, seared anchovies and dried dwellberry.
KeysToEntries.BlackGreataxe: A hulking greataxe made from black metal.
KeysToEntries.BlackKnightBody: Durable armour worn by the Children of Shadows.
KeysToEntries.BlackKnightBrute: A hulking great Black Knight, wielding a rather threatening greataxe.
KeysToEntries.BlackKnightChaps: Pliable leg armour worn by the Children of Shadows.
KeysToEntries.BlackKnightCowl: A ranged headpiece worn by the Children of Shadows.
KeysToEntries.BlackKnightCossbow: A crossbow-wielding member of the Children of Shadows.
KeysToEntries.BlackKnightGuardian: Guarding the Black Knights from people like you.
KeysToEntries.BlackKnightHelmet: A metal helm worn by the Black Knights of Dowdun Reach.
KeysToEntries.BlackKnightHoundmaster: A black knight who has really gone to the dogs.
KeysToEntries.BlackKnightPlatelegs: Sturdy leg armour worn by the Black Knights of Dowdun Reach.
KeysToEntries.BlackKnightMelee: A black knight who is tired of you farming them for their drops.
KeysToEntries.BlackKnightPlatebody: A heavy chestplate worn by the Black Knights of Dowdun Reach.
KeysToEntries.BlackKnightSniper: A long-range combat specialist of the Black Knights.
KeysToEntries.BlackKnightWarrior: The lowest rank of Black Knights.
KeysToEntries.BlackMetalBar: A bar of reforged black metal scraps. Used to make Black Knight gear.
KeysToEntries.BlackMetalScraps: Dropped from Black Knights. Can be reforged into black metal at a blast furnace.
KeysToEntries.BlackShield: A shield popularised by the Black Knights and made from black metal.
KeysToEntries.BlackSniperCrossbow: A crossbow made from black metal. Similar to those used by Black Knight snipers.
KeysToEntries.BlackSword: A sword in the style of the Black Knights, forged from black metal.
KeysToEntries.BlueDragonDust: Ground from blue dragon scales. Integral to making antifire potions.
KeysToEntries.BlueDragonhide: Obtained from felling lesser blue dragons. Can be processed at the tannery.
KeysToEntries.BlueDragonhideBody: Ranged body armour crafted from blue dragonhide. Form-fitting, yet intimidating.
KeysToEntries.BlueDragonhideChaps: Flexible ranged leg armour crafted from blue dragonhide.
KeysToEntries.BlueDragonhideCowl: Lightweight ranged headgear crafted from blue dragonhide.
KeysToEntries.BlueDragonhideLeather: Made by tanning blue dragonhide. A key component for ranged armour.
KeysToEntries.BlueDragonScale: Obtained from felled Lesser Blue Dragons. Can be ground into blue dragon dust.
KeysToEntries.Boggs: Likes how you smell. You smell like UNBRIDLED CHAOS.
KeysToEntries.BraisedCatfish: If your feline hungry, eat a catfish. Grants the Sea Life perk.
KeysToEntries.BraisedUndeadEel: Makes you queasy but does wonders for hunger. Grants the Warding Fish perk.
KeysToEntries.BrokenTitansSword: The shattered remnant of the Black Knight Titan's sword.
KeysToEntries.CarnivorousChinchompa: A walking, fluffy cannonball. Watch your fingers.
KeysToEntries.CoarseNet: Made with two coarse threads at a crafting table. Rough but effective.
KeysToEntries.Curly: The curls are ONE-HUNDRED-PERCENT NATURAL, thank you for your attention.
KeysToEntries.CursedEssence: Harvested from demons. Can be used as a tanning agent at the tannery.
KeysToEntries.CursedLeather: A sinister leather. Used in crafting.
KeysToEntries.Delrom: A demon who may faintly remind you of someone.
KeysToEntries.DemonicOil: Made by combining necrotic bonemeal and vile ashes. A crafting component.
KeysToEntries.DoubleMeatSandwich: Meat, meat and more meat. A sandwich with flank steak, rat roast and dried redberries.
KeysToEntries.DowdunReachCape: There is no better display of mastery of the Dowdun Reach area.
KeysToEntries.DreamShard: Used to craft magical equipment. Postie Pete also has a use for them.
KeysToEntries.DriedKrill: Krills hunger with one bite. Grants the Sea Legs perk.
KeysToEntries.EggsRoyale: Made by combining fried egg and fried salmon. Grants the Sea Life perk.
KeysToEntries.EnchantedMithrilCrossbowBolts: These crossbow bolts offer a chance to create a toxic burst, poisoning all nearby enemies.
KeysToEntries.FeatherBait: What is it about feathers that fascinates a fish? A great way to bait them.
KeysToEntries.FeatheredLure: Entice fish with a knotted ball of bird knock-offs.
KeysToEntries.Fido: Its staring eyes seem to be burrowing deep into your subconscious.
KeysToEntries.FishFry: Made by combining roasted lobster, braised undead eel and fried cabbage.
KeysToEntries.FriedSalmon: For when you feel like a hungry bear. Grants the Sea Life perk.
KeysToEntries.FriedSardine: Delicious little fishies. Grants the Warding Fish perk.
KeysToEntries.GiantKrill: Look at the size of that krill! Can be dried and eaten.
KeysToEntries.GlassVessel: A glass item made by glassblowing.
KeysToEntries.GlazedRoastPumpkinSandwich: A warming dish made with roast pumpkin, maple syrup and dried redberry.
KeysToEntries.Gnasher: It seems to enjoy fighting you, going by the happy eyes and lolling tongue.
KeysToEntries.GrilledTrout: Stave off hunger with this tasty bite. Grants the Sea Life perk.
KeysToEntries.GrilledUndeadBass: Undead and makes you unhungry. Grants the Sea Life perk.
KeysToEntries.GroundLimestone: Ground from limestone. With the proper tools, it can be made into glass at a furnace.
KeysToEntries.HealingPotion: Recovers some lost health. Made with irit and redberries.
KeysToEntries.Hellhound: A canine-shaped demon from the plane of Infernus.
KeysToEntries.HerbBakedTrout: Made by combining grilled trout and a baked potato. Grants the Sea Life perk.
KeysToEntries.Herring: A medium-sized fish. Its flavours emerge when smoked.
KeysToEntries.HoundmasterRexiton: Has the complete trust of his hellhounds.
KeysToEntries.InfernalEel: Slippery and sulphurous. Smoke it to make it edible.
KeysToEntries.KrillBait: If I told you why this bait works, I'd have to krill you.
KeysToEntries.LesserAshes: There seems to be something solid within the ash pile.
KeysToEntries.LesserBlueDragon: Let's hope you remembered to bring your antifire potion.
KeysToEntries.LesserDemon: Lesser only in name. Can carve noughts and crosses into your belly.
KeysToEntries.LesserFocusedFishingPotion: Grants a boost to your Fishing XP for a short period of time.
KeysToEntries.Limestone: A building material. It can also be ground into dust.
KeysToEntries.LimestoneRock: Can be mined for limestone, a hardy building material.
KeysToEntries.LinenNet: Made with two fine threads at a crafting table. An elegant little net.
KeysToEntries.Lobster: You've just been lobstered. Delectable when roasted.
KeysToEntries.LobsterBait: Scraps of lobster meat made into bait to draw in fish.
KeysToEntries.LoyalHellhound: A hellhound that has been broken to the point that it will obey the word of Rexiton.
KeysToEntries.MageOfZamorak: Just as likely to set themselves alight as you.
KeysToEntries.MapleLogs: Cut from maple trees. Can be crafted into various equipment.
KeysToEntries.MapleLongbow: A supple longbow carved from maple wood.
KeysToEntries.MapleRod: Crafted from a maple log and some mystic thread. A bad-ass rod.
KeysToEntries.MapleSap: Harvested from maple trees. An ingredient that can be cooked on a campfire.
KeysToEntries.MapleShortbow: A limber shortbow carved from maple wood
KeysToEntries.MapleStaff: A magical weapon carved from maple wood.
KeysToEntries.MapleSyrup: A sweet and nutty syrup. An ingredient for various dishes.
KeysToEntries.MapleToastie: A sweet lunch made with maple syrup and dried redberry.
KeysToEntries.MapleTree: A versatile tree that supplies maple sap and maple logs.
KeysToEntries.MeatSandwich: A carnivore's favourite, made with flank steak and rat roast.
KeysToEntries.MithrilArrows: Arrows with tips forged from mithril.
KeysToEntries.MithrilBar: A versatile metal used for crafting weapons and armour.
KeysToEntries.MithrilCrossbow: A one-handed crossbow composed mainly from mithril.
KeysToEntries.MithrilCrossbowLimbs: A pair of mithril crossbow limbs. Essential for the crafting of a mithril crossbow.
KeysToEntries.MithrilDagger: A concealable weapon, perfect for backstabbing your enemies.
KeysToEntries.MithrilDeposit: A rich seam that can be mined for mithril.
KeysToEntries.MithrilGreataxe: A two-handed battleaxe forged from mithril.
KeysToEntries.MithrilGreatsword: A sturdy two-handed sword, with strength to match its size.
KeysToEntries.MithrilHelmet: Protect your head with this durable mithril headgear.
KeysToEntries.MithrilLoggingAxe: A tool for chopping trees. Make sure to hit them with the sharp side.
KeysToEntries.MithrilMace: Crush your foes with this heavy, spiked mithril mace.
KeysToEntries.MithrilOre: Mined from Mithril deposits. It can be smelted into bars at a furnace.
KeysToEntries.MithrilPickaxe: A tool for mining. Few rocks can withstand its strength.
KeysToEntries.MithrilPlatebody: A heavy mithril plate, providing welcome protection in battle.
KeysToEntries.MithrilScimitar: A curved sword of Eastern influence, forged from mithril.
KeysToEntries.MithrilShield: A sturdy shield crafted from mithril. Perfect for holding your ground.
KeysToEntries.MithrilSword: A well-forged mithril blade for trained combatants.
KeysToEntries.MithrilWarhammer: An imposing two-handed weapon, capable of crushing any enemy.
KeysToEntries.MoltenGlass: Raw material used in the art of glassblowing.
KeysToEntries.MysticCloth: A magical textile, woven from mythic thread.
KeysToEntries.MysticFibre: Dropped from Zamorak magi. Can be spun at a spinning wheel into mystic thread.
KeysToEntries.MysticHood: A magically resonant hood, perfect for staying warm.
KeysToEntries.MysticNet: Dropped from Zamorak magi. Can be spun at a spinning wheel into mystic thread.
KeysToEntries.MysticRobe: The finest magical thread, spun into fabulous mage gear.
KeysToEntries.MysticRobeLegs: Lightweight magical gear for the aspiring sorcerer.
KeysToEntries.MysticThread: Spun from mystic fibre. Magic courses through every thread.
KeysToEntries.Nosey: Believes that the amount of cologne you put on makes you MILDLY FLAMMABLE.
KeysToEntries.OakRod: Crafted from an oak log and some wool thread. A favourite fishing rod.
KeysToEntries.Patch: Patch would like you to AVOID LINGERING EYE CONTACT please.
KeysToEntries.Pip: Is tired of hellrats taking the mickey out of her HIDEOUS HYPOCHONDRIA.
KeysToEntries.RatMasterSkrexis: Skrexis has likely built up quite the immune system.
KeysToEntries.Raven: One well-aimed crossbow bolt would take this spy down.
KeysToEntries.RawAnchovies: Doesn't look like much now, but sear it on a bonfire and receive a delicious treat.
KeysToEntries.RawArmouredCatfish: Should be de-shelled before being braised.
KeysToEntries.RawGiantKrill: A colossal crustacean. A little soggy now, so best dry it.
KeysToEntries.RawHerring: Cooked on an anvil. Which may or may not be a red herring.
KeysToEntries.RawInfernalEel: Wriggly no more. Will need to be smoked before it goes near your palate.
KeysToEntries.RawLobster: Don't worry, it's not alive anymore. For best results, roast.
KeysToEntries.RawSalmon: While it might be edible now, you'll need to fry it in this game.
KeysToEntries.RawSardine: A small fish that was brought into this world to be fried and eaten.
KeysToEntries.RawShrimp: Schrodinger's shrimp: could end up burnt or fried.
KeysToEntries.RawTrout: Grill this trout on a fire. You will thank us later.
KeysToEntries.RawUndeadBass: It may not look edible, but trust us: grill it and you're in for a treat.
KeysToEntries.RawUndeadEel: A dead undead eel. We suggest you braise it.
KeysToEntries.Reek: Would like your UNFETTERED ATTENTION: could you give him a different name, please?
KeysToEntries.RoastedLobster: Does wonders for your hunger bar. Grants the Sea Legs perk.
KeysToEntries.Salmon: Caught while moving upstream. Delicious when fried.
KeysToEntries.Sardine: A small fish that travels in shoals. Catch one or two and fry them.
KeysToEntries.SauteedSardines: Made by combining fried sardine and dried redberry. Grants the Warding Fish perk.
KeysToEntries.SauteedShrimp: A simple meal but one that will hold back the hunger. Grants the Sea Legs perk.
KeysToEntries.SearedAnchovies: Hold hunger back until lunch. Grants the Sea Legs perk.
KeysToEntries.SergeantBlister: A high-ranking Black Knight who would rather you scarpered quick-smart.
KeysToEntries.Shrimp: The simplest of all creatures to angle. Catch it and sautee it.
KeysToEntries.ShrimpBait: Scraps of shrimp dressed to be eaten by fish.
KeysToEntries.ShrimpOmelette: Made by combining fried egg and sauteed shrimp. Grants the Sea Legs perk.
KeysToEntries.SmallAshes: There seems to be something solid within the ash pile.
KeysToEntries.SmokedHerring: Nothing beats hunger like a herring. Grants the Warding Fish perk.
KeysToEntries.SmokedInfernalEel: An unusual meal, but a good one. Grants the Warding Fish perk.
KeysToEntries.SpookyBait: Bait that gives fish the heeby-jeebies, but draws them in anyway.
KeysToEntries.StandardArtisanPotion: Increases XP gain for the Artisan skill. Made with irit and necrotic bonemeal.
KeysToEntries.StandardAttackPotion: Increases XP gain for the Attack skill. Made with irit and small animal fang.
KeysToEntries.StandardConstructionPotion: Increases XP gain for the Construction skill. Made with irit and ground sandstone.
KeysToEntries.StandardCookingPotion: Increases XP gain for the Cooking skill. Made with irit and cabbage.
KeysToEntries.StandardMiningPotion: Increases XP gain for the Mining skill. Made with irit and undead bone.
KeysToEntries.StandardRunecraftingPotion: Increases XP gain for the Runecrafting skill. Made with irit and coarse animal fur.
KeysToEntries.StandardWoodcuttingPotion: Increases XP gain for the Woodcutting skill. Made with irit and feathers.
KeysToEntries.SteakSandwich: A delectable treat made with flank steak, fried onions and grilled mushrooms.
KeysToEntries.StirFry: Made by combining dried giant krill, dried redberry and smoked infernal eel.
KeysToEntries.StuffedCatfish: Made by combining dried giant krill, fried cabbage and a braised catfish.
KeysToEntries.SubjugationStaff: A powerful battlestaff, once owned and used by Archmage Alric.
KeysToEntries.SummonerFlament: A demon summoner who has lost his mind to the Dreaming Stone.
KeysToEntries.SuperLumberjackPotion: Applies the Lumberjack perk, which helps to decrease stamina lost from Woodcutting.
KeysToEntries.SuperQuarrymasterPotion: Applies the Quarrymaster perk, which helps to decrease stamina lost from Mining.
KeysToEntries.Thammarith: A rather imposing looking demon who seems distracted by something.
KeysToEntries.TitansWrath: This sword is now thrice-owned: by you, the Black Knight Titan and Lord Rasmodel.
KeysToEntries.Trout: A sizeable catch. Grill a trout and treat your belly.
KeysToEntries.UndeadBass: A bass that was dropped and is now undead. Can be grilled.
KeysToEntries.UndeadDelight: Made by combining fried grilled undead bass and grilled tomato. Grants the Sea Life perk.
KeysToEntries.UndeadEel: Life isn't even sacred for a poor eel. An acquired taste when braised.
KeysToEntries.UnholySymbol: A necklace that proudlty displays the Zamorak symbol. Don't wear it to church.
KeysToEntries.VeggieSandwich: A hunger-reducing snack made with fried cabbages and grilled mushrooms.
KeysToEntries.VileAshes: Remains of a demonic creature. A crafting material used to make demonic oil.
KeysToEntries.WeakFocusedFishingPotion: Grants a boost to your Fishing XP for a short period of time.
KeysToEntries.WillowRod: Crafted from a willow log and some fine thread. A professional-looking fishing rod.
KeysToEntries.WoolNet: Made with two wool threads at a crafting table. Unwieldy but does a job.
KeysToEntries.ZamorakCape: A cape that proudly displays obeisance to the god Zamorak.
KeysToEntries.ZamorakianAcolyte: A personal servant to Alric and a zealot of Zamorak.
KeysToEntries.ZamorakMageHood: A hood styled after the Zamorakian magi of Dowdun Reach.
KeysToEntries.ZamorakMagePack: A sack holding the personal effects of a Zamorakian.
KeysToEntries.ZamorakMageRobe: Robes styled after the Zamorakian magi of Dowdun Reach.
KeysToEntries.ZamorakMageRobeLegs: Robe legs styled after the Zamorakian magi of Dowdun Reach.
KeysToEntries.ZamorakStaff: Standard issue for any mage in Dowdun Reach.
KeysToEntries.ZamorakSword: A ceremonial sword intended as a gift to Zamorak.
KeysToEntries.ZamorakWarriorPack: A sack holding the personal effects of a Zamorakian.
KeysToEntries.UlvsLongbow: Once the bow of a silent hunter. Deals additional damage to unaware targets.
KeysToEntries.AbraxusRing: A ring that once belonged to a powerful necromancer.
KeysToEntries.DreamingStonePiece: A piece of the broken Dreaming Stone in Dowdun Reach's Nexus. It whispers if you listen closely.
KeysToEntries.BeastmasterNotes: Notes, from the beastmasters of Dowdun Reach, on how to train various creatures.
KeysToEntries.CorruptedEssenceSample: A strange sickly essence, linked to the corruption in Dowdun Reach. It writhes as you look at it.
KeysToEntries.UnholyWater: Water blessed by priests of Zamorak.
KeysToEntries.TwilightLily: A strange, glowing lily, with magical properties.
KeysToEntries.GlassOwl: A handcrafted owl made of glass. It seems to have great sentimental value to someone.
KeysToEntries.DragonsTooth: A dragon's tooth. Extracted from lesser dragons or mined from a dragon's skull found in the Highlands.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.BlackSword: The remnants of a Zamorakian weapon. Perhaps you could learn something from it.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.BlackGreataxe: The remnants of a Zamorakian weapon. Perhaps you could learn something from it.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.BlackSniperCrossbow: The remnants of a Zamorakian weapon. Perhaps you could learn something from it.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.SubjugationStaff: The remnants of a Zamorakian weapon. Perhaps you could learn something from it.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.BlackShield: The remnants of a Zamorakian shield. Perhaps you could learn something from it.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.DowdunReachCape: A piece of cloth torn from one of Dowdun Reach's tapestries.
KeysToEntries.AttackSkillcapeTrimmed: Congratulations! Reaching level 99 in Attack is an astonishing feat. Wear this cape with pride.
KeysToEntries.ArtisanSkillcapeTrimmed: Congratulations! Reaching level 99 in Artisan is an astonishing feat. Wear this cape with pride.
KeysToEntries.ConstructionSkillcapeTrimmed: Congratulations! Reaching level 99 in Construction is an astonishing feat. Wear this cape with pride.
KeysToEntries.CookingSkillcapeTrimmed: Congratulations! Reaching level 99 in Cooking is an astonishing feat. Wear this cape with pride.
KeysToEntries.FarmingSkillcapeTrimmed: Congratulations! Reaching level 99 in Farming is an astonishing feat. Wear this cape with pride.
KeysToEntries.FishingSkillcapeTrimmed: Congratulations! Reaching level 99 in Fishing is an astonishing feat. Wear this cape with pride.
KeysToEntries.MagicSkillcapeTrimmed: Congratulations! Reaching level 99 in Magic is an astonishing feat. Wear this cape with pride.
KeysToEntries.MiningSkillcapeTrimmed: Congratulations! Reaching level 99 in Mining is an astonishing feat. Wear this cape with pride.
KeysToEntries.RangedSkillcapeTrimmed: Congratulations! Reaching level 99 in Ranged is an astonishing feat. Wear this cape with pride.
KeysToEntries.RunecraftingSkillcapeTrimmed: Congratulations! Reaching level 99 in Runecrafting is an astonishing feat. Wear this cape with pride.
KeysToEntries.WoodcuttingSkillcapeTrimmed: Congratulations! Reaching level 99 in Woodcutting is an astonishing feat. Wear this cape with honour.
KeysToEntries.PoisonedMithrilArrows: Arrows with tips forged from mithril, coated in Weapon Poison.
KeysToEntries.FireMithrilArrows: Burning arrows with tips forged from mithril, coated in fire oil.
KeysToEntries.BarbedMithrilArrows: Lacerating arrows with barbed tips forged from mithril.
KeysToEntries.SalvagePileCopper: Scraps that can be searched through. I weren't stealing nuffin', copper.
KeysToEntries.SalvagePileTin: Scraps that can be searched through. There might be nowt tin there.
KeysToEntries.SalvagePileBronze: Scraps that can be searched through. Seems like it's just a pile of bronze offcuts.
KeysToEntries.SalvagePileGold: Scraps that can be searched through. All that glitters may not be gold.
KeysToEntries.SalvagePileSilver: Scraps that can be searched through. Take a look inside.
KeysToEntries.SalvagePileIron: Scraps that can be searched through. There might be something of value in there.
KeysToEntries.SalvagePileSteel: Scraps that can be searched through. It's the steel of the century.
KeysToEntries.SalvagePileMithril: Scraps of mithril that can be smelted into more useful bars.
KeysToEntries.SalvagePileBlack: Scraps that can be searched through. Little bits of Black Knight are in there.
KeysToEntries.DraconicLeatherScraps: Scruffy organic bits and pieces that can be combined to make draconic leather.
KeysToEntries.SkillTome.Basic.Fishing: A book filled with knowledge about how to efficiently tire out fish. Awards a small amount of Fishing XP.
KeysToEntries.SkillTome.Intermediate.Fishing: A book filled with knowledge about how to efficiently tire out fish. Awards a decent amount of Fishing XP.
KeysToEntries.SardinePristine: An unusually large Sardine, worthy of putting it on the wall as trophy.
KeysToEntries.TroutPristine: An unusually large Trout, worthy of putting it on the wall as trophy.
KeysToEntries.HerringPristine: An unusually large Herring, worthy of putting it on the wall as trophy.
KeysToEntries.SalmonPristine: An unusually large Salmon, worthy of putting it on the wall as trophy.
KeysToEntries.LobsterPristine: An unusually large Lobster, worthy of putting it on the wall as trophy.
KeysToEntries.UndeadEelPristine: An unusually large Undead Eel, worthy of putting it on the wall as trophy.
KeysToEntries.UndeadBassPristine: An unusually large Undead Bass, worthy of putting it on the wall as trophy.
KeysToEntries.ArmouredCatfishPristine: An unusually large Armoured Catfish, worthy of putting it on the wall as trophy.
KeysToEntries.InfernalEelPristine: An unusually large Infernal Eel, worthy of putting it on the wall as trophy.
KeysToEntries.BlackLimbs: A pair of Black crossbow limbs. Used in crafting a Black Knight Crossbow.
KeysToEntries.MapleInfusion: Made from clean water, maple sap and irit. Reduces thirst as well as stamina when blocking.
KeysToEntries.GlassPane: It's transparent that you're going to use this when building.
KeysToEntries.GlassDecoration: A delightful ornament that will really tie your home together.
KeysToEntries.BlackCrossbowLimbs: A pair of black crossbow limbs. Essential for creating a black crossbow.
KeysToEntries.StandardAntipoisonPotion: Removes poison and grants resistance to it. Made with irit and poison ichor.
KeysToEntries.StandardFarmingPotion: Increases XP gain for the Farming skill. Made with irit and undead bones.
KeysToEntries.StandardFishingPotion: Increases XP gain for the Fishing skill. Made with irit and trout.
KeysToEntries.TroutUnusual: This trout has seen things. You almost feel apologetic for catching it.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.BlackKnightHelmet: The remnants of a Zamorakian helmet. Perhaps you could learn something from it.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.BlackKnightPlatebody: The remnants of a Zamorakian platebody. Perhaps you could learn something from it.
KeysToEntries.VestigeBlackKnightLegs: The remnants of Zamorakian platelegs. Perhaps you could learn something from it.

KeysToEntries.Vestige.BlackKnightChaps: The remnants of Zamorakian chaps. Perhaps you could learn something from them.

KeysToEntries.Vestige.ZamorakMageRobeLegs: The remnants of Zamorakian mage robe legs. Perhaps you could learn something from it.

KeysToEntries.Lurch: A curious eggy smell follows this hellhound.
KeysToEntries.Tiny: About the size of a pony, so 'Tiny' doesn't cover it.
KeysToEntries.Rufus: Has the stern gaze of a leader. Looks like this is the alpha.
KeysToEntries.DowdunRaven: Never trust a raven. They are a diabolical breed.
KeysToEntries.ShroudOfNoggin: A ghostly sackcloth mask. Reduces Wither buildup while worn.
KeysToEntries.Trinket.AmuletOfAccuracy.FlavourText: A magical amulet that enhances combat.
KeysToEntries.Trinket.AmuletOfDefence.FlavourText: A mystical amulet that strengthens your defences.
KeysToEntries.Trinket.AmuletOfMagic.FlavourText: A powerful magical amulet, popular with wizards everywhere.
KeysToEntries.Trinket.AmuletOfStrength.FlavourText: An enchanted amulet favoured by warriors.
KeysToEntries.Trinket.Inspiring.Artisan.FlavourText: A magical ring, popular with artisans.
KeysToEntries.Trinket.Inspiring.Attack.FlavourText: A magical amulet that inspires bloodlust.
KeysToEntries.Trinket.Inspiring.Construction.FlavourTe: A magical ring, popular with builders.
KeysToEntries.Trinket.Inspiring.Cooking.FlavourText: A magical ring enjoyed by chefs.
KeysToEntries.Trinket.Inspiring.Farming.FlavourText: A magical ring, popular with those of an agricultural background.
KeysToEntries.Trinket.Inspiring.Fishing.FlavourText: A magical ring worn by anglers.
KeysToEntries.Trinket.Inspiring.Magic.FlavourText: A mystical amulet used by apprentice wizards to cheat at tests.
KeysToEntries.Trinket.Inspiring.Minging.FlavourText: A magical ring that makes you excited about ores.
KeysToEntries.Trinket.Inspiring.Ranged.FlavourText: A magical amulet, popular with archers.
KeysToEntries.Trinket.Inspiring.Runecrafting.FlavourTe: A magical ring that helps you understand runes better.
KeysToEntries.Trinket.Inspiring.Woodcutting.FlavourTex: A magical ring, popular with lumberjacks.
KeysToEntries.Trinket.RingOfLife.FlavourText: A magical ring with lifesaving properties.
KeysToEntries.Trinket.RingOfPursuit.FlavourText: A magical ring that makes you sneakier.
KeysToEntries.Trinket.RingOfRecoil.FlavourText: A magical ring to punish enemy aggression.
KeysToEntries.AbraxusRing.Effect: Has a chance to remove the rune cost of utility spells when cast.
KeysToEntries.Trinket.Inspiring.DurabilityWhenEquipped: This item loses durability over time when equipped.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.UnholySymbol: A sinister piece of jewellery, corroded and burned. Perhaps you can learn something from it.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.TrinketRingofLife: Endlessly burning and reconstituting itself. Perhaps you could learn from it.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.TrinketAmuletofStrength: You can feel it pulling away from you. Perhaps you could learn from it.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.TrinketAmuletofDefence: Nothing is breaking this. Perhaps you could learn from it.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.TrinketAmuletofAccuracy: Still sharp. Perhaps you could learn from it.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.TrinketAmuletofMagic: A sphere that seems to be playing Menu Chill. Perhaps you could learn from it.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.TrinketRingofPursuit: Seems eager to be elsewhere. Perhaps you could learn from it.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.TrinketRingofRecoil: Shows the worst possible side of yourself. Perhaps you could learn from it.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.GreatswordShadow: The smoke seems to be roiling inside. Perhaps you could learn from it.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.ShieldHoplite: Splattered with blood. Perhaps you could learn from it.
KeysToEntries.Vestige.ShroudofNoggin: A ghostly bundle of scratchy sackcloth. It's unsettling to hold. Still, perhaps you could learn something from it.
KeysToEntries.AdamantiteBar: A sturdy metal used for crafting weapons and armour.
KeysToEntries.AdamantiteOre: Mined from Adamantite deposits. It can be smelted into bars at a furnace.
